ingredients.items: Meat Scraps, Rubbery Jerky, Tough Meat
Chunky Rice, Furahiya Wheat, Mixed Beans
Mild Herb, Sliced Cactus, Spotted Onion, Young Potato
Great Mutton, Juicy Rib Roast, Meatwagon
Curved Shrimp, Horseshoe Crab, Spiky Blowfish
Cudgel Onion, Spicy Carrots, Western Parsley
Dragon Foot, Gator Ribmeat, Princess Pork
King Squid, Queen Shrimp, Pink Caviar
Cannon Lettuce, Rare Onion, Scented Celery
Bigmeat, Dragon Head, Dragon Tail, King Turkey
Gold Rice, Heaven Bread, Soul Beans
1,000 Year Crab, Crimson Seabream, Hairy Tuna

whim_skills.name: Crazy Lucky Cat
whim_skills.description: Increases quests reward money x2.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Aim
whim_skills.description: Increases the damage of Bowgun's NormS and Bow's lvl 1 charge by x1.1.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Ballooner
whim_skills.description: 100% chance the hot air balloon will appear on the quest and in every outside area.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Blunt Force
whim_skills.description: Bowgun melee damage increases dramatically.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Bonus Skills
whim_skills.description: Kitchen skills continue to be effective after hunter falls in battle.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Bulldozer
whim_skills.description: Gives ESP like effect on melee weapons.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Charisma
whim_skills.description: Allows the maximum possible numbers of trade with the Veggie Elder (6 times).

whim_skills.name: Felyne Combine
whim_skills.description: Increases the percentage of the combination success rate.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Constructor
whim_skills.description: The large grey boulders that sometime block an entrance can be destroyed much easier.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Courage
whim_skills.description: Prevents the Hunter from flinching (or shock) when spotted by Boss Monster.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Culinary Arts
whim_skills.description: Allows BBQ Spit to become a Gourmet Spit.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Dance
whim_skills.description: Gives attack boost similar to Power Pill when dance gesture is used. (+ 25 raw for 20 sec).

whim_skills.name: Felyne Defense
whim_skills.description: Provides a chance to decrease the damage the Hunter would receive.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Dismantle
whim_skills.description: Increases the chance to have an extra carve.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Escape
whim_skills.description: Stamina decrease rate is lessened when the Hunter is running from a boss monster.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Exchanger
whim_skills.description: Pokke Points obtained after quest increases by x1.15.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Explorer
whim_skills.description: 100% chance spawning in secret area if possible; only works in High or G-Lvl Quests.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Fear Factor
whim_skills.description: The skill allows the Boss Monster to become size 11 or less.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Fighter
whim_skills.description: Damage increases on the Taunt gesture.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Frugality
whim_skills.description: The chance of a Pickaxe or Bugnet breaking decreases.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Gastronomy
whim_skills.description: Potential chance to increase Stamina by 25 pts when a Fish Steak is consumed.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Gathering
whim_skills.description: Increases the chance to gather more times from a gathering point.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Great Break
whim_skills.description: Decrease sharpness reduction by half when the weapon bounces.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Gunpowder
whim_skills.description: All bombs are improved into their '+' form. Bombs that are affected include Sm Barrel Bomb, Lg Barrel Bomb, and Bounce Bomb.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Heroics
whim_skills.description: Attack increases by x1.35 and defense by x 1.5 when health is below 10 hp.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Kickboxer
whim_skills.description: The Attack Power of kick and taunt punch increases dramatically.

whim_skills.name: Felyne KO
whim_skills.description: KO damage of the weapons increases. Headshot with Crag S can now also stun.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Landing
whim_skills.description: Allows jumping from any heights with heavy objects in hands (eggs, stones) without breaking them.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Martial Arts
whim_skills.description: Stamina usage for maneuver decreases. This includes dodge rolls, back hops, and blocking.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Medicine
whim_skills.description: Healing item effectiveness increases by x1.1. This includes Herbs, Potions, Mega Potions, Lifepowder, and First Aid Potions. Antidote herb becomes 100%.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Mega Lucky Cat
whim_skills.description: Increases the potential chance for more Normal Rewards significantly.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Negotiation
whim_skills.description: Increases the chance to obtain rare items from the Veggie Elder. Increases the chance to obtain stolen items at the Melynx Den.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Resilience
whim_skills.description: Increases invulnerability when the Hunter rises from the ground.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Scavenger
whim_skills.description: Guarantees getting a shiny from a monster on the first try.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Special Attack
whim_skills.description: Ailment status increases by x1.125. (Poison, Paralysis, Sleep)

whim_skills.name: Felyne Strongcat
whim_skills.description: Prevents the Hunter from dropping the large object (egg) from weak attacks.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Supercarver
whim_skills.description: The Hunter is not interrupted by minor attacks during carving.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Supercat
whim_skills.description: Stamina decreases x0.5 when carrying an large object in hand (egg).

whim_skills.name: Felyne Temper
whim_skills.description: Increases Bow and Bowgun damage; range distance decreases and deviation of shells increases.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Throw
whim_skills.description: Throwing distance increases for items such as paintballs. Throwing knife and stone damage increased by x2.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Ultra Lucky Cat
whim_skills.description: Increases the potential chance for more Normal Rewards.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Vine Climber
whim_skills.description: Reduces stamina reduction by half when climbing vines.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Vine Master
whim_skills.description: Prevents the Hunter from falling against weak attack while climbing vines.

whim_skills.name: Felyne Woodwinds
whim_skills.description: Gives a 25% chance to prevent flute breaking.
